name: golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man-v2-dev
title: golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man-v2-dev
summary: utility to create manpages from markdown (source)
description:
utility to create manpages from markdown (source)
Turns Markdown into manpages, which is really handy for people
that don't want to learn how to make manpages from stuff like DocBook.
.
This package contains the source for go-md2man version 2.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man-v2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man-v2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man-v2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
